flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bradley University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3k → 3.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bradley University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.4k → $42.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bradley University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.4k → $42.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bradley University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
